embed.title: !egg
embed.description: Alerts for raid eggs before they hatch — useful for knowing a raid boss is incoming so you can plan.

fields.name: By level
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}egg level:5` — level 5 eggs
`{{prefix}}egg level:3-6` — range
`{{prefix}}egg legendary` — level:5
`{{prefix}}egg mega` — level:6
`{{prefix}}egg elite` — elite raid eggs
`{{prefix}}egg primal` — level:10

fields.name: Team and gym filters
fields.value:
`team:instinct` / `team:valor` / `team:mystic` / `team:harmony`
`ex` — EX raid eligible gyms only

Example: `{{prefix}}egg level:5 team:valor d:1500`

fields.name: RSVP and message flags
fields.value:
`rsvp` — include RSVP updates
`rsvp_only` — only RSVP updates
`clean` — auto-delete after hatch
`edit` — single message edited in place
`ping`
